note: EXTENDS run_ai_act_highrisk_fit (art-64). Resolves FS-specific Art 12/26 obligations for Annex III 5(b) creditworthiness and 5(c) life/health insurance pricing. is_high_risk MUST come from art-64 first. Aug 2026 enforcement (orig); 2 Dec 2027 under Digital Omnibus (verify).

vectors.name: 5b_creditworthiness_all_obligations_met
vectors.description: Annex III 5(b) creditworthiness system, all obligations implemented (logging, FRIA, human oversight, DB registration). Known constant: scope_verdict=ANNEX3_5B_CREDITWORTHINESS; enforcement_readiness=READY.

obligations.obligation: Log inputs, outputs, timestamps, model version, override flags, natural-person-ID field. Retain >= 6 months.
Deployer: conduct FRIA before deployment for Annex III 5(b)/(5)(c) systems. Maintain human oversight mechanism.
Register creditworthiness AI system in EU AI Act public database before deployment.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Annex III 5(b), 5(c); Art 12(2) (decision logging); Art 26(6) (deployer duties + FRIA); Art 27(1) (EU database registration)
output_payload.extends_note: This node extends run_ai_act_highrisk_fit with FS-specific Art 12 and Art 26 obligations. Run art-64 first to confirm is_high_risk=true.

enforcement_dates.note: Digital Omnibus amendments (European Parliament final approval, 16 June 2026) confirm Annex III high-risk obligations move to 2 December 2027.

vectors.name: 5c_insurance_all_gaps_remediation_required
vectors.description: Annex III 5(c) life/health insurance pricing, all obligations missing. Known: scope_verdict=ANNEX3_5C_LIFE_HEALTH_INSURANCE; enforcement_readiness=NOT_READY; 4 compliance gaps.

obligations.obligation: Log inputs, outputs, timestamps, model version, override flags, natural-person-ID field. Retain >= 6 months.
Deployer: conduct FRIA before deployment for Annex III 5(b)/(5)(c) systems. Maintain human oversight mechanism.
Register life/health insurance pricing AI system in EU AI Act public database before deployment.

compliance_gaps: Art 26(6): human oversight mechanism not in place
Art 27(1): EU AI Act database registration not completed
do_now: Implement Art 12-conformant decision log records (use build_ai_decision_log_record).
Complete Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment (FRIA) before deployment.
Implement human oversight mechanism (Art 26(6)) — must be present at deployment.
Register in EU AI Act public database at https://database.ai.ec.europa.eu before deployment.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Annex III 5(b), 5(c); Art 12(2) (decision logging); Art 26(6) (deployer duties + FRIA); Art 27(1) (EU database registration)
output_payload.extends_note: This node extends run_ai_act_highrisk_fit with FS-specific Art 12 and Art 26 obligations. Run art-64 first to confirm is_high_risk=true.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite_out_of_scope
vectors.description: Empty inputs (is_high_risk=false/undefined) returns OUT_OF_SCOPE sentinel with finite zero-state. Gate downstream on /is_high_risk eq true.

output_payload.scope_note: System classified as NOT high-risk by run_ai_act_highrisk_fit (art-64). Art 12 logging and Art 26 deployer obligations do not apply to this system. Re-run base classification if use case changes.
